productDisplayName: Nike Women White Dunk Low Casual Shoe
description: The nike Dunk Low shoes give superior performance and comfort. The heel counter offers absolute ergonomic support and cushioning to the heel, while the outsole gives excellent traction. Team these with jeans and a tee. Upper Woven fabric uppers with overlays for style, comfort and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile mesh lining for added comfort Appliquéd swoosh on the sides and appliquéd brand tab on the tongue Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Full length EVA midsole for added cushioning Outsole Flexible multi-directional rubber outsole with a full cupsole stitch for durability Pivot point on the big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
